# Demo: Sift Content Integrity

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Stop Risky Content Before it Hits Your Site

Sift helps you identify and stop illegitimate users before they can post content. Sift Content Integrity protects your community from spam and scams, helping leading businesses across the world automate content review, improve brand perception and conversion rates, and increase user engagement and retention rates.

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
